text: Welcome to the Summer 2026 cohort. Module 1 is open now — start with the reading before attempting the quiz.
A reminder that the Module 6 discussion and quiz both close October 30. Late posts are accepted but marked as such.
Optional live session this Thursday evening to review the Paris Agreement material. Recording will be posted for those who cannot attend.
Final essays are graded and the course archive will stay open for reference through the summer. Thank you all for a thoughtful term.
